# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: ci-cd-sp
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2020-04-01-preview
    dependsOn: []
    properties:
      scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}'
      roleDefinitionName: 'Contributor'
      principalId: '{servicePrincipalObjectId}'

  - name: ci-cd-sp-definition
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/servicePrincipals
    apiVersion: 2021-04-01-preview
    dependsOn: []
    properties:
      accountEnabled: true
      displayName: CI/CD Service Principal
      serviceState: Enabled

  - name: sp-password-reset-policy
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/policyDefinitions
    apiVersion: 2019-09-01
    dependsOn: [ci-cd-sp-definition]
    properties:
      policyType: 'Indexed'
      mode: 'All'
      policyRule: |
        {
          "if": {
            "not": {
              "field": "type",
              "equals": "Microsoft.ServicePrincipalPasswords"
            }
          },
          "then": {
            "effect": "deny"
          }
        }

  - name: sp-password-reset-assignment
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments
    apiVersion: 2019-09-01
    dependsOn: [ci-cd-sp-definition, sp-password-reset-policy]
    properties:
      policyAssignmentName: ci-cd-service-principal-policy-assignment
      scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}'
      policyDefinitionId: '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyDefinitions/{sp-password-reset-policy-uri}'

parameters:
  subscriptionId:
    type: string
    default: 'your_subscription_id'
  servicePrincipalObjectId:
    type: string
    default: '{service_principal_object_id}'
